pages.title: The Final Frontier
pages.text: The ultimate goal of AlienTech: Evolution! Consume entropy to unlock powerful abilities and transcend your mortal form.

pages.title: Evolution Chamber
pages.text: The machine that transforms entropy into evolutionary progress. Requires a pyramid core, ancient battery, neutrion, and gold.

pages.title: Ancient Charger
pages.text: Charges items with entropy energy. Used to power the Pharaoh Sword and Eye of Horus.

pages.title: Pharaoh Sword
pages.text: The ultimate weapon! Charged via Ancient Charger. Deals massive damage to mobs and can teleport you to targeted entities.

pages.title: Evolution Stages
pages.text: Evolution requires consuming vast amounts of entropy:$(br)$()Stage 1: 1000 Entropy - Night Vision$(br)$()Stage 2: 5000 Entropy - Speed Boost$(br)$()Stage 3: 15000 Entropy - Strength$(br)$()Stage 4: 50000 Entropy - Fire Resistance$(br)$()Stage 5: 150000 Entropy - Wither Immunity$(br)$()Stage 6: 500000 Entropy - Creative Flight$(br)$()Each stage grants permanent buffs!
